zotero_searches.query: sedentary behavior LST GWAS PCOS genetic architecture obesity insulin resistance gonadotropin loci
zotero_searches.notes: Report records final evidence set rather than raw hit counts. Included Wang 2022, Hayes 2015, Liu 2022, Stamou 2024, Dapas and Dunaif 2022, Zhao 2025.

pubmed_searches.query: ("polycystic ovary syndrome"[Title/Abstract] OR PCOS[Title/Abstract]) ("genome-wide association"[Title/Abstract] OR GWAS[Title/Abstract]) loci

inclusion_criteria: Sedentary behavior or LST GWAS evidence
PCOS GWAS or genomic architecture evidence
PCOS adiposity, obesity, insulin-resistance, or metabolic pathway evidence
exclusion_criteria: Duplicate Zotero record 75BUECD8 for Zhao et al. 2025
Claims not directly supported by inspected metadata or abstracts
unresolved_gaps: Direct sedentary behavior-PCOS horizontal pleiotropy not established
Brain enrichment for LST loci not confirmed
Exact 88 LST-specific loci statement not verified
